statement: In every magma, Equation 1683 (`x = (y * x) * ((x * x) * z)`) implies Equation 3531 (`x * y = x * ((z * x) * w)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0927
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y x) (op (op x x) z))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op x (op (op z x) w))
